description: Emma joined the Nuclear Restoration Services Ltd Board in November 2023 as a NDA Nominated Non-Executive Director.  Emma joined the NDA as Group Chief Commercial and Business Development Officer in February 2022 from BEIS where she was the Commercial and Operations Director and a Non-executive Director for UK Shared Business Services Ltd. Emma brings with her a wealth of cross-sector commercial experience obtained in both leadership and delivery roles across Whitehall and the private sector Emma is a member of the Company’s Safety, Security Health & Environment Committee and a member of the Nominations & Remuneration Committee.

details.body:
Emma joined the Nuclear Restoration Services Ltd Board in November 2023 as a NDA Nominated Non-Executive Director. 

Emma joined the NDA as Group Chief Commercial and Business Development Officer in February 2022 from BEIS where she was the Commercial and Operations Director and a Non-executive Director for UK Shared Business Services Ltd. Emma brings with her a wealth of cross-sector commercial experience obtained in both leadership and delivery roles across Whitehall and the private sector

Emma is a member of the Company’s Safety, Security Health & Environment Committee and a member of the Nominations & Remuneration Committee.

Emma joined the Nuclear Restoration Services Ltd Board in November 2023 as a NDA Nominated Non-Executive Director.

Emma brings with her a wealth of cross-sector commercial experience obtained in both leadership and delivery roles across Whitehall and the private sector

Emma is a member of the Company’s Safety, Security Health & Environment Committee and a member of the Nominations & Remuneration Committee.

Emma joined the NDA as Group Chief Commercial and Business Development Officer in February 2022 from BEIS where she was the Commercial and Operations Director and a Non-executive Director for UK Shared Business Services Ltd. Emma brings with her a wealth of cross-sector commercial experience obtained in both leadership and delivery roles across Whitehall and the private sector

Emma is a member of the Company’s Safety, Security Health & Environment Committee and a member of the Nominations & Remuneration Committee.
